title: MELERIO Lint Rollers 6 Refills Full 420 Sheets with Protective Cover,1 handle with 6 Extra Sticky Lint Roller Set for Clothes, Sofa, Bed and Carpet, Lint Roller for Pet hair, Cat Hair, Dog Hair, Dust
features: Eco-friendly :Our stickers are eco-friendly and recyclable! Packed with 1 handle and 6 stickers for a total of 420 sheets, these refills will not only last you a LONG TIME, but you won't have to worry about the environmental impact of the paper!

Adhesive Lint Roller: Professional-strength adhesive requires fewer passes to remove debris, making the job faster and easier.This pet clothing depilator is eco-friendly, non-toxic, odor-free, and leaves no traces on the object being cleaned.
Helper: Great for cleaning dog and cat hair from furniture and fabrics, perfect for picking up pet fur, crumbs, sticky dirt, and other annoying little particles.
EASY TO PEEL -- Lint Roller Refill with Bevel Cut makes it easier to peel off.
ANY QUESTIONS--Please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description What can we do? Clean up spilled sequins and craft supplies. Remove dust and debris from handbags. Clean your house、 kitchen drawer or car seat. Remove dust, hair and pet hair from carpets and furniture We make hair and fuzz removal easy for all ! With more sheets per roll, 70 to be exact, our lint roller set can meet your most stringent cleaning needs. Work on all surfaces and types of clothing from linen, cotton, velvet, silk, floors, sofas, vintage upholstery, wooden surfaces, walls, pool tables, pockets and even wool rugs. Portable Design Easy to Use Our ergonomic handle ensures light, comfortable control and effectively captures all unsightly hair, fur and dust. Cleaning pet hair is simple and easy with this portable designed lint roller set. Package The handle of lint roller puts inside the package. Please open the package to get it.
